form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Artistic Scott at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 48 on April 2 at $31. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing third behind Halloween at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 35 on April 6 at $4. Go well again aided by the ace draw.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after eight days. Lacklustre first-up performance when 9th (Fr2) over 1609m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 15 m by Sinbinned (1:54.40) in NR up to 48 on April 2 at $151. Must do a lot more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Placed in restricted room inside the final 50m.
Weakened over the concluding stage to be beaten considerable distance.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr5) over 1609m at Menangle was 8th-16.16 at the bell, beaten 16 m by What For (1:54.50) in 3yo+ 0LTW o eligible 3yo+ NR47 on March 31 at $19. Before that, 5th (Fr1) over 1609m at this track beaten 6 m by Ultimate Rhapsody (1:55.60) in NR up to 47 on March 13 at $14. Draws for a good showing.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track beaten 15 m by War Western (1:54.30) in NR up to 53 on April 2 at $41. The run prior was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr6) over 1609m after racing wide at this track beaten 40 m by Love A Belle (1:54.70) in NR up to 58 M on March 28 at $17. Has both a class drop and a better draw in her favour.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Failed to be in position at the start.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr1) over 1980m at Tamworth was 7th-13.5 at the bell, beaten 17 m by General Rocker (2:28.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 26 at $9.50. At the start before was well back in the run when 5th (Fr4) over 1609m at this track, beaten 6 m by Rocknroll Rocket (1:56.00) in NR up to 47 on March 13 at $26. One to consider as his best is good enough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had a tendency to race ungenerously in the early stages of the event.

form.formComment: Last start good run when 3rd (Sr1) over 1609m at this track, beaten 5.5 m by Artistic Scott (1:55.90) in NR up to 48 on April 2 at $15. Two runs back came from midfield and won by 4 m when quickly away, (Fr1) at this track (2:28.30) beating Ultimate Trouble in NR up to 48 on March 28 at $6 at the bell was 4th-10.1. Going along well. Capable of taking this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running over the concluding stages and not fully tested.
Hampered as the field negotiated the first turn.

form.formComment: Solid performance when a close second after being driven well back, behind Quickshift Girl at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 50 on March 19 at $10. Then a handy effort when a close second after showing early speed, behind Shark Dancer at this track over 1609m in a NR 51 to 54 on April 6 at $6. Could be ready to break through.
